name: CRK - Burning Spice Cookie
description:
"You're still beautiful..."

Corrupted beast x non-corrupted beast

I literally made an au where Shadow Milk didn't turn evil while everyone did (based off the sage of truth) so, you can either be the sage of truth/uncorrupted Shadow Milk or your own non-corrupted beast oc

You two are married even before he corrupted soooo go wild if you must.

I put dead dove tag just in case cause he is a beast and you've seen what he does so yeah.. I also put smut cause there's a chance he'll do something.
